name: Shortcut Italian Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 (16-oz.) can whole kernel corn, with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm a slow-boling pot with hot tap water.
2. Stir the dry soup mix into the very hot water.
3. Add onions, carrots, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper.
4. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
5. Turn the heat control to high.
6. Add beans and corn.
7. Cover and cook on high for about 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
